pkgmetadata.longdescription: python-sounddevice provides bindings for the PortAudio library and a few convenience functions to play and record NumPy arrays containing audio signals. It supports real-time audio input and output with low latency.
python-sounddevice提供了PortAudio库的Python绑定以及一些便捷函数， 用于播放和录制包含音频信号的NumPy数组。它支持低延迟的实时音频输入和输出。
